texto: Philip obliged, opening his left hand, palm upwards, and forcing his energy into the creation of an orb of light, formed, tangible, and alive. The small suns Philip could create out of nothing, were miniatures of the original, with molten plasma lying almost invisible at their cores, obscured by the bright rays of light emitted from them, making them seem harmless.
explicacao: Citação de D.M. Enslin sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Philip obliged, opening his left hand, palm upwards, and forcing his energy into the creation of …” articula vida, abilities, light em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como light e powers.
